4 ?07 0000000000 a

Constant
4 C 4 1111111111 a mismatch
4 C 4n 0000000000 a match 1/1
all match C 4n

4 I 0 1011011100 6 mismatch

4 AND 07 0000011100 3 mismatch

Applying to 10100011
Input
I 0 = 1
I 1 = 0
I 2 = 1
I 3 = 0
I 4 = 0
I 5 = 0
I 6 = 1
I 7 = 1
Output
0 I 4 = 0
1 I 5 = 0
2 I 6 = 1
3 I 7 = 1
4 C 4n = NOT(1) = 0
5 I 0 = 1
6 I 1 = 0
7 I 2 = 1

\boxed{00110101}
